<!-- Thanks for contributing to Coruro! Keep this short and concrete. -->

## What

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 — or "none" -->

## How it was tested

<!-- Commands run and what you observed. -->

- [ ] `just gate` passes (typecheck + lint + prettier + tests), or:
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint` / `npm run format:check`
- [ ] Manually exercised the change in `npm run tauri dev`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused (one logical change).
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or machine-specific values added.
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated for user-facing changes.
